programme.title: Franky tries to convince Usopp that there’s no hope for the Going Merry, but the sniper – inspired by a mysterious moment from the past – remains loyal to his beloved boat
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The man who is loved even by his ship! Usopp's tears!

programme.title: A look back at Franky’s past reveals the amazing origins of the sea train – and paints a vivid picture of his younger days, spent alongside Iceberg and the legendary shipwright Tom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Franky's past! The day the sea train first ran!

programme.title: Franky’s backstory continues! The sea train is a success, and it looks like Tom’s life is spared! Unfortunately, a government spy is searching for a reason to investigate Tom, and Franky provides the ammunition!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spandam's scheme! The day the sea train shook!

programme.title: Tom does the unthinkable in an attempt to protect his apprentices, but young Franky is unable to control his rage, leading to a showdown with a spy – and a train!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The end of the legendary man! The day the sea train cried!

programme.title: Chopper’s heroism may mean the difference between life and death for Iceberg and Paulie, Nami learns the agonizing truth about Robin, and Sanji prepares to make his move!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The truth behind her betrayal! Robin's sorrowful decision!

programme.title: Nami makes a frantic dash for the Sea Train station, Chopper searches desperately for Zoro and Luffy, and Sanji plays it cool while waiting for the right time to spring into action.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The steam whistle forces friends apart! The sea train starts to run

programme.title: Nami arrives at the train station a minute too late, Sanji makes his presence aboard the sea train known, and the search for Luffy and Zoro continues!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sanji barges in! Sea train battle in the storm!

programme.title: Chopper and Robin risk their own lives in a desperate attempt to save Luffy and Zoro from a monstrous wall of water! Meanwhile, Sanji moves ever closer to a reunion with Robin.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's soul cries out! Straw hat luffy makes a comeback!

programme.title: Luffy and Nami ask to borrow a ship so they can chase down the sea train, but the weather is too severe to set sail. Lucky for them, Iceberg and his friends are full of surprises!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Another sea train? Rocketman charges forth!

programme.title: Luffy, Zoro, Chopper, and Nami rocket toward a rendezvous with the assassins of CP 9, but they’ll need to forge an alliance with some new friends to have any chance at survival!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rescue our friends! A bond among foes sworn with fists!

programme.title: Zoro and Luffy go head-to-head with Mother Nature, and Sanji’s rescue mission is bolstered by Franky’s allegiance – and the arrival of the mysterious Sniper King!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Smash the wave! Luffy and zoro use the strongest combo!

programme.title: Sniper King, a mysterious warrior from the island of snipers, lends a hand as Franky and Sanji try to fight their way to Robin.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious man appears?! His name is sniper king!

programme.title: Sanji mixes it up with a deranged cook, Franky dukes it out with the newest member of CP9, and the Sniper King gets creative in his attempt to reach Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown between cooks! Sanji vs. Ramen kenpo!

programme.title: Franky and Sanji continue to battle the thugs of CP9. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the gang find themselves headed for a collision that could spell doom for everyone!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Zoro faces a fellow master of the blade, Sanji looks to end his fight against a rampaging ramen master, and Franky finally lands a big blow against his CP9 foe!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Clash! Demon-slasher zoro vs. Ship-slasher t-bone!

programme.title: The Sniper King hatches a daring escape plan, but the assassins of CP9 are more powerful than our heroes ever imagined. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang run into a very familiar frog!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Scramble over robin! A cunning plan by sniper king!

programme.title: As their train approaches Enies Lobby, Franky’s kind words cut through Robin’s cold exterior. Luffy’s train is thrown off course, but the group gains a powerful new ally!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The judicial island! Full view of enies lobby!

programme.title: The Straw Hats hatch a plan to rescue Robin, but as usual, Luffy can’t wait to find a fight. Will his impulsive attack derail their mission?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Landing operations start! Charge in, straw hats!

programme.title: Luffy manages to reach the main island, but the Franky Family’s assault is stopped short by a couple of angry giants!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy cuts through! Big showdown on the judicial island!

programme.title: Luffy makes short work of a few hundred marines, the Franky Family takes down a giant, and the assassins of CP9 report back to Spandam!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Battle against giants! Open the second gate!

programme.title: Zoro’s quick thinking – and a little help from a giant frog – sends the sea train soaring into the sky on a collision course with armed guards and their canine companions!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Find a way out! Rocketman takes flight!

programme.title: Nami electrocutes the enemy with a Clima Tact attack, but the bad guys have the Straw Hats surrounded until the Franky Family shows up with a couple of sea monsters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Catch up with luffy! The straw hats' all-out battle

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, Nami, and Chopper try to catch up with their captain, Soge King is nowhere to be found, and Luffy runs head first into a battle with Blueno!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin betrayed! The motive of the world government!

programme.title: Luffy shows off his new strength in a brawl with Blueno, Soge King befriends a giant, and a hulking sea beast makes the ultimate sacrifice.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Give robin back! Luffy vs. Blueno!

programme.title: While Luffy continues his battle with Blueno, Soge King’s giant companions make their presence felt, and the assassins of CP9 experiment with Devil Fruits!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Don't stop! Hoist the counterattack signal!

programme.title: A blind Kingbull fights with his last breath to get the Straw Hats one step closer to their captain. Luffy kick his body into second gear to protect his friends from dangerous foes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Almost to luffy! Gather at the courthouse plaza!

programme.title: Luffy batters a baffled Blueno with his powerful new fighting style, and the cowardly Spandam begins to panic at the sound of the Straw Hats approaching!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everything is to protect my friends! Second gear activated!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew are finally reunited and ready to rescue Robin, but the raven-haired beauty remains reluctant to rejoin her former mates despite Franky’s urging.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Give us your answer, robin! The straw hats' outcry!

programme.title: Flash back to Robin’s days as a young girl, her dangerous pursuit of forbidden knowledge, and her encounter with a friendly giant.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin's past! The girl who was called a devil!

programme.title: Robin’s flashback continues with the heartbreaking arrival of her mother – and the government’s cruel and brutal invasion of a peaceful island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fated mother and daughter! The mother's name is olvia!

programme.title: Professor Clover reveals a startling and sinister theory about the World Government, Robin reunites with her mother, and a giant joins the fight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The tragedy of ohara! The terror of the buster call!

programme.title: The painful story of Ohara – and Robin’s younger years – draws to a tragic close. Luffy declares war on the World Government, and Robin finally changes her tune!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Say you want to live! We are your friends!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are ready to begin the fight for Robin, but first, Luffy flashes back to memories of his childhood – and the man who made him want to become a pirate!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Jump towards the falls! Luffy's feelings!

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Continuing his crusade to punish violent criminals in America, former FBI agent Frank Castle arrives in New York to take on a scarred villain who plots to take control of the underworld.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Robocop 2, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: This first sequel pits Robocop against a gang of drug dealers and the title creature--a supposedly improved version of himself that has gone berserk.

programme.title: Robocop 3, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: In this second sequel to the 1987 hit, RoboCop leaves the force and joins the rebellion to battle the evil business corporation OCP, which uses a police-like group to remove the homeless people who populate the site of a future upscale development.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: Night Stage To Galveston, (1952, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram work for a newspaper publisher, and find evidence of corruption in the Texas State Police. The publisher’s daughter is kidnapped to prevent the story from being published.

programme.title: The Old West, (1952, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry tames and sells wild horses to a stagecoach line. His only competitor ambushes and shoots Gene, who is nursed back to health. A wild stagecoach race to test Gene's horses is arranged.

programme.title: High Lonesome, (1950, Drama)
programme.desc: When a series of murders occurs in a small west Texas town, the new young drifter in town, Cooncat (Barrymore), is immediately suspected of the murders. But Cooncat witnessed one of the murders, and his description of the murderers is met with disbelief.

programme.title: El Paso, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: A lawyer finds that guns speak louder than words when he rids a Western town of its criminal element.

programme.title: Gunslinger, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: When the town marshal is gunned down, his wife Rose (Beverly Garland) dons his badge. But now an evil dancehall diva (Allison Hayes) wants her dead and hires a gunslinger (John Ireland), who agrees to kill Rose...until he falls in love with her!

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Terror In A Texas Town, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: A greedy financier and a gang of gunmen force people to sell land.

programme.title: The Halliday Brand, (1957, Drama)
programme.desc: A western about a young man's (Joseph Cotten) disillusionment with his father (Ward Bond), a corrupt sheriff. When his dad turns away from the lynching of his sister's lover, the boy rebels and his father declares him an 'outlaw.'

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge, (1957, Drama)
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: Bad Company, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: A group of mismatched young robbers attempts to make it as outlaws on the frontier, but their ill-fated heists quickly reveal just how unprepared they are for life in the Wild West.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman, (1978, Drama)
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romance)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: An aging playboy finds that love is as serious as a heart attack when he falls for his girlfriend's mother. Too bad she's now dating his young doctor! There's only one way they can all get what they want: Something's Gotta Give.

programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: An aging playboy finds that love is as serious as a heart attack when he falls for his girlfriend's mother. Too bad she's now dating his young doctor! There's only one way they can all get what they want: Something's Gotta Give.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Pineapple Express, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: A lazy stoner is the sole witness to a murder by an evil drug lord and a corrupt cop. Marked for death, he runs for his life, dragging his dazed dealer and his supplier with him on a hilarious pot-fueled adventure.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon, (1970, Entertainment)

programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Drama)

programme.title: O Assassino, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um guarda-costas altamente qualificado, vingando a morte de seu irmão, descobre um círculo de corrupção que se estende aos mais altos níveis da sociedade e do governo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Vinnie Jones, Berik Aitzhanov, Sergey Nikonenko Diretor: Akan Satayev

programme.title: B13-U 13º Distrito - Ultimato, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Damien e Leito estão retornando ao Distrito 13 em uma missão para levar a paz ao setor controlado por cinco líderes de gangues diferentes, antes que os serviços secretos da cidade tomem medidas drásticas para resolver o problema. programme.desc: 2022. O ladrão realiza o roubo de sua vida quando rouba o traficante psicótico, Temple. O plano corre bem até que o ladrão descobre um clandestino em seu carro de fuga: a esposa grávida de Temple, Mia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Vinnie Jones, Lina Lecompte, James Clayton Diretor: James Clayton

programme.title: O Mito, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. O arqueólogo Jack continua tendo sonhos recorrentes de uma vida passada, onde ele é o grande general Meng Yi, que jurou proteger uma princesa chamada Ok-Soo. programme.title: Confusões no Lava-Jato, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. Após começar a trabalhar em um lava-jato, Sean se vê brigando com o melhor amigo, Dee Loc, que também trabalha lá e duvida que Sean tenha sido contratado como seu supervisor. No entanto, eles logo deixam a briga de lado quando o chefe é sequestrado. programme.desc: 2003. No ano de 2055, o esporte predileto dos ricos é viajar no tempo para caçar dinossauros. programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte misteriosa de seu pai, uma jornalista volta à sua cidade natal no interior. Ao chegar, descobre que o local está devastado pela seca e se tornou um lugar atormentado por gangues e os maus efeitos da pobreza extrema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.desc: 1970. Um ex-policial durão e cansado tem um novo e entediante estilo de vida em Malta a bordo de um barco completamente transformado. No entanto, sua vida vira de ponta-cabeça quando se vê envolvido em uma rede de espionagem internacional de alto risco. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Blecaute, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um futuro distópico, uma adolescente experiente em tecnologia e seu pai partem em uma jornada desesperada para sobreviver em um novo mundo apocalíptico. Juntos, eles fogem da cidade e buscam refúgio com seu avô nas montanhas do noroeste americano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Sem Rastros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que uma menina desaparece de um parque de trailers, o pai e a mãe da garota decidem fazer justiça com as próprias mãos. A busca desesperada dos pais pela verdade acaba levando a uma revelação chocante. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Osso Duro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Deacon viaja às Filipinas com o objetivo de doar um rim para sua sobrinha doente. Depois de uma noite de romance, ele descobre que uma mulher o enganou e roubou seu rim. Deacon começa uma violenta corrida contra o tempo para recuperar o órgão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Duelo Final, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rebecca achou que finalmente havia se livrado do mundo secreto do combate ilegal. Agora, com sua irmã em perigo, ela deve relutantemente retornar à vida que abandonou para salvar sua família e confrontar o líder enlouquecido do clube de luta. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um caso de identidade trocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra entre dois rivais de Nova York: Rabino e Chefe, os senhores do crime. Sob o olhar atento de um detetive e do assassino Goodkat, Slevin precisa elaborar um plano para salvar a sua pele. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Aventura e Tanto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cão vira-lata Pluto aparece de repente e muda a vida da família Davis, que está enfrentando tempos difíceis. Em pouco tempo, ele salva uma criança, traz conforto a um garoto doente e repara um relacionamento desgastado de pai e filho. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Branded, (1950)

programme.desc: 2020. O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jackie Chan, John Cusack, Adrien Brody Diretor: Daniel Lee

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimmy captura seu irmão Billy e o leva ao Mestre das Sombras, mas o vilão se volta contra ele. Para escapar, os irmãos se transformam e enfrenam o Mestre. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Containment, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mark e sua família acordam e encontraram as portas e as janelas de seu apartamento lacradas. Os moradores do prédio começam a tentar encontrar uma saída para a situação, mas logo descobrem que seus destinos já estão selados dentro de casa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Maldição do Castelo Margam, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma equipe de parapsicólogos americanos viaja ao País de Gales para realizar um estudo no Castelo de Margam, um dos edifícios mais assombrados do Reino Unido. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Maldição da Sereia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma sereia é tirada da água, tem seu rabo cortado e enviada para um hospital psiquiátrico, onde ninguém acredita que ela é realmente uma sereia. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Colheita, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para escapar de seus problemas conjugais, uma jovem família viaja da cidade para passar o verão em um vilarejo Amish, que está tomado por uma presença malévola. Os visitantes logo descobrem que foram trazidos para lá por uma razão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Vivendo na Escuridão - A História do Ted, o Explorador de Cavernas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte do pai, dois irmãos se reúnem para o funeral e acabam encontrando uma caverna misteriosa próxima do local do enterro. Enquanto a exploram, eles são forçados a enfrentar o passado, tanto deles, quanto do próprio pai. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Insanidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mulher vai para o campo para passar um fim de semana tranquilo após perder o emprego e terminar seu último relacionamento complicado. Ela aluga uma casa de campo de um viúvo, que luta para esconder suas tendências homicidas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Assassinos Sádicos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma família de açougueiros sádicos se estabeleceu no interior, longe do mundo e do olhar dos homens. Em todas as estações, invernos gelados como verões escaldantes, todos que cruzam seu caminho são vítimas em potencial. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Rastros do Além, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de um evento cataclísmico o mundo passa a viver uma nova realidade onde os vivos e os mortos coexistem. Após nove anos de convivência pacífica, uma jovem é ameaçada e se arrisca para descobrir o por quê desta mudança repentina. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Última Peça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paula organiza uma festa surpresa para seu irmão e, quando está prestes a terminar de decorar a casa com muitos dinossauros, descobre que um dos brinquedos veio faltando uma peça. Para recuperá-la, ela tem que enfrentar o malvado dono da loja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sempre de Olho - Uma História Marble Hornet, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma equipe de jornalistas de uma cidade pequena encontra uma caixa com algumas fitas de vídeo. Ao assistirem aos filmes, eles se deparam com uma figura sem rosto torturando uma família. E logo descobrem que a criatura também os está seguindo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Folaké descobre o cadáver do seu pai e as suas suspeitas recaem sobre Bola; Bola quer enviar os restos mortais do seu pai para Lagos; os últimos desejos do Chefe Abayomi são revelados. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bola quer unir o Conselho à sua causa e ameaça Jacob se ele ficar em Lagos; os associados de Jacob estão nervosos por Abayomi estar morto; o tribunal aceita o pedido de Bola e cancela o testamento; Folaké descobre a duplicidade de Prospero. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob visita Folaké e descobre a traição de seu amigo; Bola diz a Prospero que pode influenciar o setor energético; Lerato está no hospital e corre o risco de sofrer um aborto espontâneo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob e Folake têm um filho e ela anuncia a Jacob que vai a Lagos para apanhar seu irmão; Bola é preso pelo assassinato de seu pai; o testamento é reconhecido: Jacob se torna Chefe iorubá; graças às suas ligações, Bola sai da prisão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Runtime, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: O Relógio Encantado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angel é uma garota tímida que odeia dizer não. Ela encontra um relógio mágico que realiza desejos e a torna incrivelmente popular. Mas essa nova vida talvez não a deixe realmente feliz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Carlitos o Faz Tudo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Carlitos trabalha incansavelmente em um hotel e é explorado por seu patrão. Apaixonado por uma bela moça que mora na vila, ele precisará dividir a atenção da jovem com um rapaz que veio da cidade e também se interessa por ela. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meu Querido Elfo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mãe solteira compra um apartamento antigo, sem saber que uma criatura mítica, um elfo, vive no apartamento há séculos. Os novos donos da casa precisam fazer amizade com a criatura, cuja tarefa é justamente proteger o local de uma bruxa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: E Agora? A Mamãe Saiu de Férias!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Giulia, mãe de três crianças elétricas, decide ir viajar sem a família por dez dias, e o caos da casa sobra para Carlo, marido e pai que vive apenas para o trabalho. Perdido e com um problema nas mãos, ele tem que se virar para dar conta. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jungle - Protegendo a Selva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dipankar Nair gerencia santuário de elefantes ameaçado por caçadores de marfim. Seu filho Raj, veterinário de Mumbai, visita o local no aniversário da morte da mãe e se aproxima dos elefantes Bhola e Didi. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 438 Dias, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Os jornalistas suecos Martin Schibbye e Johan Persson cruzam ilegalmente a fronteira da Somália com a Etiópia para relatar como a busca implacável por petróleo afetou a população da região de Ogaden, isolada e cheia de conflitos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Outra Face da Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após perder a mãe e a casa para as tropas invasoras alemãs, Artur encontra certo consolo em se juntar ao exército. No entanto, a guerra não é nada como ele imaginou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sobibor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O oficial soviético Alexander Pechersky organiza uma revolta e uma fuga em massa dos prisioneiros de Sobibor, um campo de extermínio, em outubro de 1943. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tráfico de Mulheres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Três jovens mulheres, da América, da Nigéria e da Índia, são vítimas do tráfico de mulheres, sendo escravizadas para a prática de prostituição. O lucro pode ser de centenas de bilhões de dólares anualmente, superando o das maiores empresas do mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. programme.title: 2001. É o primeiro dia do Beyblade World Championships em Moscou e, quando os Bladebreakers deixam o hotel, eles ainda não conseguiram localizar Kai que está desaparecido há algum tempo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E43

programme.title: 2001. Determinados a vingar a derrota devastadora do All Starz, os Tigres Brancos são os próximos a enfrentar o Neo Borg no Torneio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E44

programme.title: 2001. Enquanto os Bladebreakers se preparam para as finais, eles são abordados por um homem de terno que lhes diz que Kai exige encontrá-los em um lago Baikal congelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E45

programme.title: 2001. Agora que Kai finalmente é leal aos Bladebreakers, ele devolve o Black Dranzer a Boris, causando sérios danos à sede inimiga no processo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Yoshio Takeuchi
programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E46

programme.desc: Beyblade - T01E47

programme.title: 2001. programme.title: 2023. Yugi e Joey liberam cada um o seu monstro mais forte, Caveira Invocada e Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos, mas a força deles perde a imponência, comparada ao tremendo poder do Guardião do Portão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E21

programme.title: 2023. Usando a mágica do Olho do Milênio, Pegasus prende a alma de Mokuba dentro de uma carta bem na frente de Kaiba! Para conseguir o direito de desafiar Pegasus, Kaiba precisa derrotar Yugi e pegar suas estrelas primeiro. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E22

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba invoca Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis, o monstro mais forte do jogo, a fusão de três Dragões Brancos de Olhos Azuis! Yugi perdeu seus poderosos Monstros de Duelo, mas um duelista verdadeiro nunca desiste! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E23

programme.title: 2023. Yugi começa a tecer uma estratégia para destruir o Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis, mas tem que decidir se vai clamar vitória ou poupar a vida de Kaiba. O coração de Yugi está dividido. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E24

programme.title: 2023. Tendo perdido suas estrelas para Kaiba, assim como sua única chance de salvar seu avô, Yugi está em estado de choque. Será que Téa pode fazer Yugi recobrar os sentidos ganhando as estrelas de Mai, ensinando o coração do duelista a Yugi? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E25

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos entram no castelo e veem que Kaiba está pronto para duelar contra Pegasus, e a alma de Mokuba continua com um futuro incerto! O poder do Olho do Milênio dá a Pegasus a habilidade de ler a mente das pessoas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E26

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba é impotente diante do deck Mundo Toon de Pegasus e de sua habilidade de ler mentes. Quando o duelo acaba, Pegasus prende a alma de Kaiba em uma carta, como com o avô de Yugi e Mokuba! Yugi está farto! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E27

programme.title: 2023. É a noite da véspera da batalha final, e muitas criaturas estão agitadas! Yugi jura derrotar Pegasus pelo bem de seu avô. Tristan lidera uma equipe de reconhecimento para descobrir os segredos de Pegasus. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E28

programme.title: 2023. Diante do olhar sufocante de Pegasus, Yugi se distrai do duelo com Mai. Após cometer erros de tática bobos e deixar Mai obter uma vantagem enorme com seu Dragão de Estimação da Harpia, será que Yugi recuperará o foco ou sucumbirá à pressão intensa? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E29

programme.title: 2023. Mai se recuperou de sua derrota anterior para Joey, tornando-se uma duelista melhor. Será que Yugi aprendeu com sua derrota para Kaiba, ou o sentimento de derrota ainda pesa em seu coração? A resposta está nas cartas! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E30

programme.title: 2023. Joey procura desesperadamente a carta que permitirá que ele entre na batalha final, sem perceber que Bandit Keith a roubou. Enquanto ele reluta em aceitar que Serenity ficará cega para sempre, ele recebe ajuda de um novo amigo! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E31

programme.title: 2023. Após o deck Máquina de Bandit Keith forçar Joey a jogar na defensiva, Joey copia a estratégia de Keith e metaliza seu Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos! Sua vitória é certa, ou o trapaceiro Bandit Keith tem literalmente uma última carta debaixo da manga? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E32

programme.title: 2023. Com seu orgulho por sua força como duelista em jogo, Joey desafia Yugi pelo direito de enfrentar Pegasus. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E33

programme.title: 2023. Yugi fica chocado quando Joey usa a carta Mago do Tempo contra ele, justamente a carta que ele deu a Joey como sinal de amizade! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E34

programme.title: 2023. Yugi se prepara para a batalha suprema contra Pegasus, com as almas de seu avô, Kaiba e Mokuba em jogo. No meio-tempo, Tristan e Bakura se infiltram no castelo para encontrar os irmãos Kaiba, mas será que Bakura está voltando ao seu eu maligno de novo? Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E35

programme.title: 2023. Pegasus também pune Yugi com seu deck Toon e habilidade de ler mentes. Ao passo que Pegasus faz os monstros de Yugi se virarem contra ele, Yugi perde a determinação de batalhar. Será que Pegasus prenderá a alma de Yugi em uma carta, assim como com Kaiba? Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E36

programme.title: 2023. Yugi descobriu como escapar da habilidade de Pegasus de ler mentes: Yugi alterna entre suas duas almas! Yugi consegue destruir o Mundo Toon de Pegasus, mas o duelo só começou. O próximo nível do mortal Jogo da Sombra está prestes a começar! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E37

programme.title: 2023. Yugi esmorece de cansaço sob o poder do devastador Jogo da Sombra. Seus amigos gritam incentivos desesperados, mas suas vozes não conseguem penetrar a esfera de escuridão. A chance de vitória de Yugi está esvaecendo, e sua vida também. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 4
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E38

programme.title: 2023. Pegasus invoca Renunciado, um monstro assustador que pode assimilar os Monstros de Duelo de Yugi! Yugi reage com... Kuriboh? A criatura mais fraca e menor do jogo? Yugi desistiu ou tem uma última estratégia para arrancar a vitória das garras da derrota? Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 5
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E39

programme.title: 2023. A Saga Pegasus chega ao seu fim, mas uma nova jornada está prestes a começar! Yugi conhece um egípcio misterioso chamado Shadi, que entra na mente de Yugi com a Chave do Milênio. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E40

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos retornam do Reino dos Duelistas e conhecem uma jovem chamada Rebecca, que exige que o avô de Yugi lhe devolva o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis! Ela veio reivindicar a carta que o avô de Yugi roubou do avô dela muitos anos atrás! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E41

programme.title: 2023. Rebecca está enganada em acreditar que o avô de Yugi roubou o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis do avô dela. Yugi precisa defender o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis para ensinar a ela que o que conta não é o poder das cartas, mas o coração delas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E42

programme.title: 2023. A junta de diretores desonestos da KaibaCorp prende Kaiba dentro de um jogo de realidade virtual! Mokuba recruta Yugi e Joey para libertar Kaiba desse jogo sem igual, no qual perder equivale a morrer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E43

programme.title: 2023. A missão para resgatar Kaiba continua com uma ajudinha de... Mai? Mas será que Yugi e seus amigos se adaptarão a um mundo virtual em que as regras e estratégias mudam a toda hora? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E44

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos resgatam Kaiba, mas ainda estão presos no jogo! A única saída requer enfrentar o Dragão de Cinco Cabeças, mas Joey, Mokuba e Mai perdem todos os seus pontos de vida no difícil duelo! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E45

programme.title: 2023. Um novo aluno, Duke Devlin, derrota Joey em um jogo de Duel Monsters, forçando Joey a ser seu servo. Duke força Joey a usar um uniforme de cachorro e o humilha em público, forçando Yugi a desafiar Duke para um duelo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E46

programme.title: 2023. Em troca da liberdade de Joey, Yugi concorda em desistir de Duel Monsters para sempre se ele perder. Sem conhecer bem as regras, Yugi começa mal. As chances dele não melhoram, e Duke revela que criou Monstros dos Dados-Masmorra com a ajuda de Pegasus! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E47

programme.title: 2023. Yugi usa suas habilidades de jogo natas para virar a mesa contra Duke, mas Duke menciona mais uma regra: todas as criaturas ocupam território no tabuleiro-grade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E48

programme.title: 2023. Depois que o todo-poderoso Orgoth, o Implacável de Duke deixa toda a esquadra de monstros de Yugi em pedaços, Yugi só tem mais um turno antes de perder todos os seus pontos de vida! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E49

programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. Ele é um inimigo familiar e formidável do Reino dos Duelistas. Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E01

programme.title: 2023. A misteriosa ameaça que controla Bandit Keith estilhaça o Enigma do Milênio antes de atear fogo na arena de duelos! Será que Yugi consegue remontar o Enigma do Milênio e salvar o espírito antes que tudo seja engolido pelas chamas? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E02

programme.title: 2023. A origem de Duel Monsters é revelada! Usando a mágica do Colar do Milênio, a historiadora egípcia Ishizu Ishtar mostra a Kaiba como Duel Monsters era jogado milênios atrás! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E03

programme.title: 2023. O espírito do Enigma do Milênio percebe que suas memórias do Egito antigo se esvaíram, mas Téa o ajudará a descobrir os mistérios de seu passado! No entanto, a busca deles é interrompida pelo duelista dançarino Johnny Steps e seus monstros do rock! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E04

programme.title: 2023. Yugi descobre que era um faraó poderoso que salvou o mundo 5.000 anos atrás e agora deve salvá-lo de novo! No meio-tempo, Kaiba testa os poderes de Obelisco, o Atormentador, do Deck dos Deuses Egípcios, contra a fúria do Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E05

programme.title: 2023. Joey é forçado a entrar num duelo e pode perder seu precioso Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos para os Caçadores Raros. Embora Joey esmague seus inimigos com sua poderosa armada de monstros, eliminar pontos de vida não é o único caminho para a vitória... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E06

programme.title: 2023. Hora de dominar novas regras e monstros. Que comece o Torneio da Cidade da Batalha! No primeiro duelo do torneio, Yugi desafia o Caçador Raro para recuperar o Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos de Joey. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Caçador Raro, Parte 1: Começo de Cidade da Batalha
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E07

programme.title: 2023. Yugi se dá conta da estratégia do Caçador Raro de invocar o poderoso Exodia, mas é tarde demais para detê-lo! O Caçador Raro já tem quatro peças de Exodia na mão, e a quinta e última peça é a próxima carta do deck! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Caçador Raro, Parte 2: Encarando Exodia
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E08

programme.title: 2023. O duelista psíquico Espa Roba derrota Rex Raptor tão fácil quanto a um otário, e Joey é o próximo da lista! Quais são as chances de Joey, quando Espa Roba tem a habilidade telepática de ler todas as cartas na mão de Joey? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E09

programme.title: 2023. Joey descobre que a percepção extrassensorial de Espa Roba é uma farsa, mas ainda está sob seu controle! O Jinzo de Espa Roba não só massacra todos os monstros de Joey, mas fica mais poderoso a cada turno! A sorte de Joey chegou ao fim... Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E10

programme.title: 2023. O duelista mágico Arkana transporta Yugi para a arena de duelos mais letal do mundo, em que o perdedor é enviado para o Reino das Sombras! Yugi tem que vencer esse duelo ou perderá muito mais que seu Mago Negro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E11

programme.title: 2023. É Mago Negro contra Mago Negro! No entanto, enquanto Yugi só controla um Mago Negro, Arkana tem três em seu deck! Embora excedido em número, Yugi jamais desistirá, desde que continue confiando no coração das cartas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E12

programme.title: 2023. Para encarar o Mago Negro de Arkana, Yugi tira um coelho da cartola: a Pequena Maga Negra! É a batalha dos sexos, para determinar o verdadeiro mestre dos magos! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E13

programme.title: 2023. O trapaceiro Weevil Underwood tece uma teia de mentiras para atrair Joey para um duelo desequilibrado! Weevil secretamente infesta o deck de Joey com um parasita que impede que Joey invoque monstros fortes! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E14

programme.title: 2023. Joey esmaga a Grande Mariposa Perfeitamente Suprema, mas Weevil solta a feroz Rainha dos Insetos, a joia suprema dos insetos, que fica mais forte com cada inseto horripilante que ela canibaliza! Será que a devastadora real de Will Weevil subjugará Joey? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E15

programme.title: 2023. Yugi enfrenta outro dos Caçadores Raros nefandos de Marik – o silencioso, mas mortal Strings! programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E16

programme.title: 2023. Strings invoca uma das criaturas mais poderosas da história de Duel Monsters... o monstro deus egípcio Slifer, O Dragão Celeste! programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E17

programme.title: 2023. O feitiço Cartas Infinitas permite que Strings mantenha um número ilimitado de cartas na mão. Assim, Slifer, O Dragão Celeste de Strings pode desenvolver poder de ataque infinito! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E18

programme.title: 2023. Joey luta contra o duelista do mar Mako Tsunami e seu grupo de bestas marinhas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E19

programme.title: 2023. O guerreiro oceânico de Mako O Pescador Lendário libera uma onda de destruição, destruindo os monstros de Joey das profundezas do mar sorrateiramente! As habilidades, treino e experiência de Joey serão testados ao extremo antes de ele ser liquidado. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E20

programme.title: 2023. Abduções abundantes! Marik, com a ajuda de Bakura, sequestra Joey e Téa! Para piorar as coisas, os Caçadores Raros também sequestram Mokuba para forçar Yugi e Kaiba a enfrentarem a dupla de duelistas Umbra e Lumis no topo de um arranha-céus! programme.title: 2023. programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2

Bound by a blood oath to help him, Wick travels to Rome to square off against the worlds deadliest killers. Starring Keanu Reeves, Common, Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: To mark 20 years together, Jacob plans a surprise trip to Antwerp for Charlotte; when a third person joins, things take an erotic, dangerous turn; cul-de-sac outcast Alan dusts off his telescope.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Upon her return from Antwerp, Charlotte throws herself into her work; Gossip about the trip spreads throughout the hospital, leading to tension; Mia tries to do a good deed for Alan.

programme.title: Starbuck
programme.desc: More than 140 people sue a fertility clinic to reveal the name of the sperm donor (Patrick Huard) whose frequent contributions resulted in 533 offspring. Starring Patrick Huard, Julie Le Breton, Antoine Bertrand.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Below Her Mouth
programme.desc: An unexpected affair between two women develops into a passionate connection that changes their lives. Starring Natalie Krill, Erika Linder, Mayko Nguyen.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will begins to experience strange visions that are connected to the Cult of Kali; Magnus has difficulty with finding the solution to their problems.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team must find Kali in order to prevent tidal waves from killing millions; Will fights for his life in Mumbai.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: An Indiana lineman (Richard Dreyfuss) and other UFO-sighters, beleaguered by earlier incidents, finally have documented contact with space aliens. Starring Richard Dreyfuss, François Truffaut, Teri Garr.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Back in Action
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny tries to find Daffy Duck after the Daffy loses his job and travels to Las Vegas with a man. Starring Brendan Fraser, Jenna Elfman, Steve Martin.

programme.title: Step Dogs
programme.desc: Meatball, a wise cracking country dog, and Cassie, Hollywoods most pampered pet, meet when their owners get married. The two fight constantly until burglars break into their house, and they must team up to protect their home. Starring Dylan Schmid, Brittney Wilson, Eliana Jones.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: Chaos reigns when two clueless fathers (Cuba Gooding Jr., Paul Rae) take charge of a dilapidated summer camp and its ill-behaved attendees. Starring Cuba Gooding, Lochlyn Munro, Paul Rae.

programme.title: The Master of Disguise
programme.desc: A genial waiter (Dana Carvey) tries to rescue his parents from a criminal mastermind by assuming various identities. Starring Dana Carvey, Jennifer Esposito, Harold Gould.

programme.title: Strange Brew
programme.desc: The Canadian McKenzie brothers (Dave Thomas, Rick Moranis) cork a beer-factory brewmeister (Max von Sydow) whos out to rule the world. Starring Dave Thomas, Rick Moranis, Max von Sydow.

programme.title: Bill and Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: The ruler of the future tells best friends Bill and Ted they must compose a new song to save life as we know it. But instead of writing it, they decide to travel through time to steal it from their older selves and bring harmony to the universe. Starring Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter, Kristen Schaal.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: An inept dog groomer (Jeff Daniels) and a limousine driver (Jim Carrey) chase the latters dream girl (Lauren Holly) cross-country. Starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two lazy, immature men become rivals when the marriage of ones mother and the others father forces them to live as siblings in the same house. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Jacob comes to a heartbreaking realization, while Mias past finally catches up to her, leading to tumultuous events for everyone.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Relationships are imploding, and the fallout seems to have deadly consequences; Leo is in a race against time to try and uncover who is really behind the deaths at the hospital, while Alan is forced to take drastic actions to protect Mia.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance. Starring Gary Oldman, Armie Hammer, Evangeline Lilly.

programme.title: Owning Mahowny
programme.desc: A casino manager preys on a compulsive gambler (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who had kept his obsession a secret from his girlfriend (Minnie Driver). Starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Minnie Driver, Maury Chaykin.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she cant figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will is having trouble recovering after his experience with Kali, but the team soon finds that insomnia is the least of his problems; Helen discovers an unbelievable gift from an equally unbelievable source.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team goes on a routine mission to retrieve an Abnormal and take it to safety; the mission becomes anything but routine when they are forced to stage a bank heist in order to protect the public from harm.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street
programme.desc: A retail-war lawyer (Dylan McDermott) goes to court to prove a department-store Santa Claus (Richard Attenborough) is for real. Starring Richard Attenborough, Elizabeth Perkins, Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power. Starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard.

programme.title: Charlies Angels
programme.desc: Three private detectives try to rescue a kidnapped computer pro whose voice-ID software would threaten global security. Starring Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore, Lucy Liu.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged newswoman (Meg Ryan) becomes obsessed with meeting a grieving widower (Tom Hanks) she heard on a late-night radio call-in show. Starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Bill Pullman.

programme.title: What a Girl Wants
programme.desc: A vivacious teenager (Amanda Bynes) leaves New York in order to meet her estranged father (Colin Firth) in London. Starring Amanda Bynes, Colin Firth, Kelly Preston.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Driven by an intense need for fame and validation, members of a dysfunctional Hollywood dynasty have lives as dramatic as any movie. Starring Julianne Moore, Mia Wasikowska, John Cusack.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter (Alison Lohman) probes the reasons behind the sudden split of a 1950s comedy team (Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth). Starring Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth, Alison Lohman.

programme.title: Fugitive Pieces
programme.desc: A writer (Stephen Dillane) has trouble moving past his haunting memories of the Holocaust. Starring Stephen Dillane, Rade Serbedzija, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla resurfaces, sending Helen an SOS from deep within the Colombian Highlands; Will doesnt believe he can be trusted, and he may be right.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Kate are hijacked by armed thugs while transporting Abnormals. But before the gunmen get what they want, an old Abnormal friend, seeking safe harbor, attaches itself to Kate, endowing her with super powers.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: A silent-film star (Gene Kelly) loves a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds) who dubs his squeaky-voiced co-star in a 1927 Hollywood talkie. Starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor.

programme.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy and Rarity embark on an epic journey to save Ponyville from a dark force. Starring Emily Blunt, Kristin Chenoweth, Liev Schreiber.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: When hard times hit the town of Swallow Falls, a failed inventor constructs a device that turns water into delicious food. Starring Bill Hader, Anna Faris, James Caan.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures. Starring Bill Hader, Anna Faris, James Caan.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Jor-El of Krypton sends his baby to Earth, where he grows up as Clark Kent and works at the Daily Planet. Starring Christopher Reeve, Gene Hackman, Marlon Brando.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing. Starring Logan Lerman, Emma Watson, Ezra Miller.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: A Thousand and One
programme.desc: Unapologetic and free-spirited Inez kidnaps her 6-year-old son, Terry, from the foster care system. They set out to reclaim their sense of home, identity and stability in a rapidly changing New York City. Starring Teyana Taylor, Aaron Kingsley Adetola, Aven Courtney.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Escape From Crime
programme.desc: An unemployed photojournalist finally gets his big break when he accidentally snaps a shot of a bank thief. Starring Richard Travis, Julie Bishop, Jackie Gleason.

programme.title: Dark Victory
programme.desc: An heiress (Bette Davis) with only months to live embarks on a social whirl, then marries her doctor (George Brent). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: Honeymoon for Three
programme.desc: A novelist (George Brent) goes to Cleveland with his fiancee (Ann Sheridan) and meets an old flame tired of her husband (Charlie Ruggles). Starring Ann Sheridan, George Brent, Charlie Ruggles.

programme.title: Experiment Perilous
programme.desc: A doctor (George Brent) frees a young woman (Hedy Lamarr) from her devious philanthropist husband (Paul Lukas). Starring Hedy Lamarr, George Brent, Paul Lukas.

programme.title: You Cant Escape Forever
programme.desc: A demoted reporter (George Brent) and his girlfriend (Brenda Marshall) seek to expose a crime kingpin. Starring George Brent, Brenda Marshall, Gene Lockhart.

programme.title: Swingtime in the Movies
programme.desc: A director working on a musical falls for a local waitress working in a canteen. Starring Fritz Feld, Kathryn Kane, John Carroll.

programme.title: Montana Belle
programme.desc: Singing outlaw Belle Starr (Jane Russell) quits the Dalton gang and tricks a saloonkeeper (George Brent). Starring Jane Russell, George Brent, Scott Brady.

programme.title: The Gay Sisters
programme.desc: The eldest (Barbara Stanwyck) of three sisters protects their Fifth Avenue mansion from a developer (George Brent) she once married. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Geraldine Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Gold Is Where You Find It
programme.desc: A mining engineer (George Brent) falls for a wheat growers daughter (Olivia de Havilland) during a Sacramento Valley land war. Starring George Brent, Olivia de Havilland, Claude Rains.

programme.title: The Old Maid
programme.desc: Her suitors (George Brent) Civil War death forces an unwed mother (Bette Davis) to let her married cousin (Miriam Hopkins) raise her daughter. Starring Bette Davis, Miriam Hopkins, George Brent.

programme.title: Jezebel
programme.desc: A New Orleans belle (Bette Davis) uses another man (George Brent) to make her fiance (Henry Fonda) jealous. Starring Bette Davis, Henry Fonda, George Brent.

programme.title: The Great Lie
programme.desc: A lost aviators (George Brent) socialite wife (Bette Davis) makes a deal with a pianist (Mary Astor) having his baby. Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Mary Astor.

programme.title: In This Our Life
programme.desc: A wretched woman (Bette Davis) runs off with her sisters (Olivia de Havilland) husband, for starters. Starring Bette Davis, Olivia de Havilland, George Brent.

programme.title: My Reputation
programme.desc: An Illinois widow (Barbara Stanwyck) with two young sons meets a major (George Brent) on leave who wants to have an affair. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Warner Anderson.

programme.title: Love Me or Leave Me
programme.desc: A 1920s Chicago mobster bullies singer Ruth Etting to Broadway and Hollywood. Starring Doris Day, James Cagney, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: Calamity Jane
programme.desc: Wild West sharpshooter Jane (Doris Day) falls for Wild Bill Hickok (Howard Keel) and tries to act more ladylike. Starring Doris Day, Howard Keel, Allyn Ann McLerie.

programme.title: My Dream Is Yours
programme.desc: A singers (Lee Bowman) ex-agent (Jack Carson) turns a wholesome girl (Doris Day) into a radio star. Starring Jack Carson, Doris Day, Lee Bowman.

programme.title: Please Dont Eat the Daisies
programme.desc: A New York drama critic (David Niven) moves his wife (Doris Day) and four boys to an old mansion in the country. Starring Doris Day, David Niven, Janis Paige.

programme.title: April in Paris
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat (Ray Bolger) escorts a chorus girl (Doris Day) mistakenly invited to Paris on behalf of American theater. Starring Doris Day, Ray Bolger, Claude Dauphin.

programme.title: Secret Enemies
programme.desc: FBI agents (Craig Stevens, John Ridgely) raid a New York hotel, sending Nazi spies to an upstate hunting lodge. Starring Craig Stevens, Faye Emerson, John Ridgely.

programme.title: Dont Talk
programme.desc: A federal agent tries to find an enemy informant. Starring Donald Douglas, Gloria Holden, Barry Nelson.

programme.title: Action in Arabia
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (George Sanders) and a French agent (Virginia Bruce) thwart a Nazi payoff to Arab sheiks in 1941 Damascus. Starring George Sanders, Virginia Bruce, Lenore Aubert.

programme.title: Background to Danger
programme.desc: A U.S. spy (George Raft) goes by train to Turkey and joins Russian agents against a Nazi spy (Sydney Greenstreet). Starring George Raft, Brenda Marshall, Sydney Greenstreet.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: A Dutch intelligence officer (Clark Gable) trains a shady woman (Lana Turner) for the underground, then thinks shes a Nazi spy. Starring Clark Gable, Lana Turner, Victor Mature.

programme.title: Above Suspicion
programme.desc: Honeymooners (Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray) spy for the British in 1939 Germany to learn more about the Nazis new magnetic mine. Starring Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray, Conrad Veidt.

programme.title: Assignment in Brittany
programme.desc: A French captain (Pierre Aumont) poses as a Nazi leader to pinpoint a U-boat base off the coast. Starring Jean-Pierre Aumont, Susan Peters, Richard Whorf.

programme.title: Sabotage Agent
programme.desc: A British spy (Robert Donat) helps the Czech underground blow up a Nazi poison-gas factory in Prague. Starring Robert Donat, Valerie Hobson, Walter Rilla.

programme.title: Hotel Berlin
programme.desc: An escapee (Helmut Dantine) from Dachau, an actress (Andrea King) and others hide in a grand hotel as the Third Reich falls. Starring Helmut Dantine, Andrea King, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugss home falls in the middle of an oil field that is owned by a stubborn business tycoon. This triggers a hilarious tug of war over the property rights to the space.

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: A cattleman (Rock Hudson) and his spoiled wife (Elizabeth Taylor) watch an upstart oilman (James Dean) try to take over Texas. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Rock Hudson, James Dean.

programme.title: The Last Picture Show
programme.desc: The lives of high schoolers (Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges), a debutante (Cybill Shepherd) and others overlap in a dying 1950s Texas town. Starring Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges, Cybill Shepherd.

programme.title: Dancer, Texas Pop. 81
programme.desc: Four teens rile residents of a tiny town off Highway 91 with their decision to relocate in Los Angeles. Starring Breckin Meyer, Peter Facinelli, Eddie Mills.

programme.title: Brewster McCloud
programme.desc: A birdlike boy (Bud Cort) lives in the Houston Astrodome, advised by his guardian angel (Sally Kellerman). Starring Bud Cort, Sally Kellerman, Michael Murphy.

programme.title: Seven Days in May
programme.desc: An aide (Kirk Douglas) discovers his generals (Burt Lancaster) Pentagon plot and tells the president (Fredric March). Starring Burt Lancaster, Kirk Douglas, Fredric March.

programme.title: Lucky Me
programme.desc: A songwriter (Robert Cummings) finds a singer (Doris Day) and her stranded troupe working in a Miami hotels kitchen. Starring Doris Day, Bob Cummings, Phil Silvers.

programme.title: The Helen Morgan Story
programme.desc: A hoodlum (Paul Newman), a lawyer (Richard Carlson) and alcoholism affect the 1920s torch singers (Ann Blyth) career. Starring Ann Blyth, Paul Newman, Richard Carlson.

programme.title: Helen of Troy
programme.desc: Menelaus and Agamemnon lead their Greek hordes against peaceful Troy to recapture the kidnapped queen (Rossana Podesta). Starring Rossana Podesta, Jack Sernas, Cedric Hardwicke.

programme.title: Land of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: An Egyptian king (Jack Hawkins) builds a pyramid for himself and his riches, which his wife (Joan Collins) wants. Starring Jack Hawkins, Joan Collins, Dewey Martin.

programme.title: Strange Lady in Town
programme.desc: A 19th-century doctor meets with public resistance when she tries to establish a medical practice in Santa Fe. Starring Greer Garson, Dana Andrews, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Rebellious Cal (James Dean) competes with his twin, Aron, for the love of his rigid father (Raymond Massey) and for a girl in 1917 California. Starring James Dean, Julie Harris, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Roger Corman: The Pope of Pop Cinema
programme.desc: "Roger Corman" is a by the numbers look at one of the most influential names in Hollywood; though many know him for his low budget exploitation movies, Roger Corman is also responsible for giving many names their start in the business.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: A busboy is embraced by the beatnik art community when he develops an impressive but morbid method of sculpturing. Starring Dick Miller, Barboura Morris, Antony Carbone.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that its carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it. Starring Jonathan Haze, Jackie Joseph, Mel Welles.

programme.title: Teenage Doll
programme.desc: After killing a member of a teenage gang in a fight over her boyfriend, a girl seeks the protection of his gang. Starring June Kenney, Fay Spain, John Brinkley.

programme.title: Five Guns West
programme.desc: Five criminals are recruited by the Confederacy for a dangerous mission in exchange for a pardon. The men must travel to Kansas to intercept a stagecoach that is carrying a Confederate traitor and spy. Starring John Lund, Dorothy Malone, Mike Connors.

programme.title: Troppo

programme.desc: The headline-grabbing murder of 21-year-old British backpacker Grace Millane while on a solo holiday in New Zealand.

programme.title: T.I.M.
programme.desc: Prosthetics engineer Abi works on her companys latest product, an AI humanoid called T.I.M. thats designed to serve man; things soon take a turn for the worse when T.I.M. starts to develop a dangerous obsession with her. Starring Georgina Campbell, Eamon Farren, Mark Rowley.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: The Klaus family home is burned down in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: When Abbie Speirs body is pulled from her burning house in a quaint farming community, investigators quickly discover that the fire is no accident, and that a killer could be lurking closer to home than anyone can imagine.

programme.title: Cat Daddies
programme.desc: Man has a new best friend in this heartwarming portrait of nine men whose lives have been forever changed by their proud love of cats.

programme.title: Retrograde
programme.desc: A minor traffic citation spirals into an all-consuming obsession for a young woman when she decides to take on the police and the city. Starring Molly Reisman, Sofia Banzhaf, Bessie Cheng.

programme.title: Who Killed Our Father?
programme.desc: After the death of her foster sister, Leila takes a DNA test and discovers the identity of her biological father and sister. However, when her father is tragically murdered, she soon finds herself in more danger than she ever could have imagined. Starring Kirsten Comerford, Devin Cecchetto, Joanne Boland.

programme.title: Influenced to Kill
programme.desc: Popular lifestyle influencer Amanda Jane mysteriously vanishes after staying at a struggling inn. Suspicious of foul play, an employee looks into Amandas disappearance, not realizing that shes at risk of becoming the next victim. Starring Kyla Nova, Allen Williamson, Ashley Brinkman.

programme.title: Kill Victoria
programme.desc: One night, a quartet of best friends jokingly speculate on how they would kill Victoria, in order to save their best friend from making the worst mistake of his life by marrying her. Things go south when the jokes become reality. Starring Robin Dunne, Sara Canning, Aaron Poole.

programme.desc: A shooting outside a local restaurant leaves Raul Cuadros dead; camera footage leads to felon David Randall Wright, a career criminal who leads interrogators down a winding path as they hope to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Rebecca calls the police when she finds her husband dead in their living room; when the police begin to suspect that the widow could be a suspect, they must find a balance between pushing for the truth and potentially accusing an innocent woman.

programme.desc: Yoga teacher Ann cannot escape her manic family and miserable dating life. Things start looking up, however, when her friends set her up with a divorced dad who has an adorable 7-year-old daughter. Starring Heather Graham, John Brotherton, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her home, her infant son left unharmed just feet away. With no forced entry and few clues, the case goes cold for decades, until groundbreaking DNA technology leads investigators to an unexpected answer.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A Fourth of July cruise turns deadly as a passenger vanishes moments after leaving the dance floor; the details of what occurred that night continues to haunt family and friends as they search for closure.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: An owner-operator gambling cruise director is found dead in the bathroom; all signs point to murder.

programme.title: The Wandering Barber
programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better; to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn about local barbers.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldnt be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe its time to take a chance on love. Starring Golda Rosheuvel, John Hannah, Sophie Cookson.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen ODriscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: TV news anchorwoman Marisa Burke and her seemingly perfect husband, Mark Kandel, become the eye of a media storm when Marks twisted double life starts making headlines.

programme.title: Fake
programme.desc: Birdie is excited to celebrate Antons wedding with Joe by her side; their plans fall apart when Joe urgently needs a property deposit; with their future at stake, Birdie scrambles to gather the money.

programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Steak and Sweet Onion
programme.desc: The competition grows fiercer as Chef Rachelle of Rachelles Creative Dishes squares off against Chef Ohh. With Steak and Sweet Onion as the ingredients, our competitors must dish out sweet and savory meals. Who will secure a chance to continue?

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Salmon and Kale
programme.desc: Get ready for a seafood showdown! Chef Melody of Serenita Homestead grills it up against Chef Don of Carsons BBQ.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Rib Tips and Apple
programme.desc: Chef Stanzee of Cupcakes Kitchen battles it out against Chef Adrian of DaMunchies ATL; featuring rib tips and apples, the competitors must delicately balance two different flavors to impress the judges with their dishes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Catfish and Polenta

programme.title: In the Meantime

programme.title: Staycation

programme.title: Family Time - Its About to Be Lit

programme.desc: Tony is forced to work from home while his office is being fumigated; Ebonys new friend has a significant negative influence on her.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Lockdown

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2 (2015)

programme.title: Tank Girl (1995)
programme.desc: A renegade (Lori Petty) challenges the controller (Malcolm McDowell) of the worlds water supply on a post-apocalyptic desert Earth.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: Victorian London schoolboys Holmes (Nicholas Rowe) and Watson (Alan Cox) become friends while in pursuit of a lethal pagan cult.

programme.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the Eighth Dimension (1984)
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the Eighth Dimension (1984)
programme.desc: A space hero and his team of do-gooders battle Dr. Lizardo and his army of Red Lectroids.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Excellent Adventure (1989)

programme.title: Bill and Teds Bogus Journey (1991)
programme.desc: The dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) beat the Grim Reaper (William Sadler) in a board-game contest, so he must help them stop their evil robot twins.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine (2010)
programme.desc: Following a night of drinking in a ski-resort hot tub, four pals awake in 1986, getting a chance to rewrite the past.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: Kyle Reese goes back to 1984 to save Sarah Connor and emerges in an alternate timeline in which Sarah has been raised as a warrior by a Terminator guardian.

programme.title: John Carpenters Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: The Rock (1996)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicolas Cage) and a British spy (Sean Connery) who once escaped from Alcatraz are sent to the former island prison to stop a disgruntled war hero (Ed Harris) from obliterating San Francisco with chemical warheads.

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: When alien invaders lay waste to planet Earth, its up to a select group of survivors to make a last-ditch stand. Fighting superior technology, mankinds best weapon is the will to survive.

Earths billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist, world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society.

programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima (1949)
programme.desc: A Marine sergeant (John Wayne) pushes a colonels son (John Agar) and other recruits until theyre ready to fight.

programme.title: Houdini (1953)
programme.desc: Magician/escape artist Harry Houdini (Tony Curtis) tours with his wife (Janet Leigh) and tries to contact his dead mother.

programme.title: The Rock (1996)

programme.title: The Cutting Edge (1992)
programme.desc: An ex-hockey player (D.B. Sweeney) and a prima donna (Moira Kelly) bicker as paired figure skaters shooting for the Olympics.

programme.title: The Birdcage (1996)
programme.desc: In Miami Beach, a gay couple pretend to be man and wife when a sons future father-in-law and family visit.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: As the casino vote nears, Kristen juggles Mirandas protests and Boyles demands; Jon wrestles with guilt over Atlantic City while Richard tries to mend things with Nadia; the production faces crises when romance blooms backstage and Linus bows out.

programme.title: The Terminator (1984)
programme.desc: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to stop a cyborg killing machine, which has been programmed to execute a young woman whose unborn son is the key to humanitys future salvation.

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: An entrepreneur invites scientists (Sam Neill, Laura Dern), a mathematics theorist (Jeff Goldblum) and others to his jungle theme-park featuring dinosaurs regenerated from DNA.

programme.title: Universal Soldier (1992)
programme.desc: Dead soldiers from the 60s surface in the 90s as high-tech warriors reanimated by the U.S. government.
